title: Update Mac installer to use gvproxy v0.5.0
body:
This PR is the Mac installer portion of #16656
Windows is already handled by #17023 (merged)

Two more pieces remain (external repos)
1. brew package formula
2. rpm specfile for Linux

```release-note
NONE
```

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *n1hility* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [n1hility] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

@ashley-cui @baude @lsm5 How do you recommend coordinating this with the rpm aspects? IIUC the machine tests rely on the podman-gvproxy output of the podman rpm which is a bit of a chicken-egg problem.  Do we want to rely on manual verification for now? Or look at an override to build and install a particular gvproxy rev vs the package?
